note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.block.face module functions.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the area of a face.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the face extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fblock
methods.description: Get the face block associated with this face.

methods.name: fid
methods.description: Get the DFN fracture ID for this face.

methods.name: flowplane
methods.description: Get the fluid flow plane associated with this face.

methods.name: gp
methods.description: Get the index of vertex number (int) of a face.

methods.name: gridpoints
methods.description: Get a list of gridpoints that make up this face.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the face group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: face.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the face. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this face is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: hostblock
methods.description: Get the block to which a face belongs.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the face id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: face.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the face is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) for the face.

methods.name: is_excavated
methods.description: Get the excavated status of the host block.

methods.name: is_hidden
methods.description: Get the hidden state of the host block.

methods.name: is_original
methods.description: Get the original block face indicator.

methods.name: is_planar
methods.description: Get the planar flag for a face.

methods.name: jset
methods.description: Get the joint set ID for this face.

methods.name: ngp
methods.description: Get the number of vertices (gridpoints) on a face.

methods.name: normal
methods.description: Get the face face normal vector (vector).

methods.name: normal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the face face normal vector.

methods.name: normal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the face face normal vector.

methods.name: normal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the face face normal vector.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the face location (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the face location.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the face location.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the face location.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the face extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: face.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the face group name in a given slot.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this face is live.

methods.name: zone
methods.description: Get the index of that zone that contains the given face.
